reason: A heist outfit unravels as greed and paranoia expose each member’s darkest betrayal.
A gang’s botched robbery forces them to suspect each other when things go violently wrong.
An elite crew’s final score crumbles under mistrust as personal demons take control.
A tight-knit team of codebreakers is torn apart when secrets leak and loyalties shift.
Ex-cons plot a diamond job that collapses under the weight of double-crosses.
A lone operative’s undercover mission fails when allies’ greed fractures the plan.
A crime boss’s last job backfires as envy and suspicion poison his closest allies.
A mysterious stranger pulls a band of drifters into a dangerous plot fueled by betrayal.
A seasoned thief’s final con unravels when former partners turn on each other.
Small-time criminal dives into Hollywood’s underbelly, only to face backstabbing co-horts.
